labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 813940 ($1,103,248,651) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 813940 ($3,168,064,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

occupations.title: Secretaries and Administrative Assistants, Except Legal, Medical, and Executive
